text:
ort tempered person
If Mars is combined with Rahu or if there is a combination
of Mars + Rahu + Ravi the native would be very short tempered
person. If the combination of Ravi + Jupiter + Mars + Rahu
exists in the chart of the native the husband would have a short
tempered character.
Husband is having a Government related Job:
If there is a combination of Mars + Ravi + Kern + Jupiter
exists in a chart the husband will have a Government plated Job.
Even if the combination of Sarum + Kern + Ravi + Jupiter exists
the native will have a Government related job.
Husband is of adjustable character:
If Mars is combined with Mercury + Kern in the chart, the
husband will be of an adjustable character.
Husband is having a commercial job
If Mars has a combination of Mercury + Venus in 2nd
house to him the husband will have a luxurious commercial
profession.
Husband is having a travelling .job
IrMoon is posited in S'h or 9th or in 2nd to Mars or if Moon
